38.reason: [Output order is reversed. Should be `token.tokenType + " " + token.token` to match the required format: "word_category_code character/string_form"]

reasons.buggy-claude-sonnet-4-6-1: 0.2 , reason:  [Output order is reversed. Should be `token.tokenType + " " + token.token` to match the required format: "word_category_code character/string_form"]

280.reason: Error: curTokenType not set in the else branch, leading to null or undefined token type

reasons.buggy-claude-sonnet-4-6-1: 0.2 , reason:  [When a single '&' error occurs, curTokenType is uninitialized/stale from a previous token, producing a Token with a wrong type that gets added to tokens list despite being an error]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Error: curTokenType not set in the else branch, leading to null or undefined token type
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  Unconditionally creates and adds a token with uninitialized curTokenType even when an error occurs
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  In the error branch, curTokenType is not assigned, which will cause a NullPointerException or use a stale value. Additionally, tokens should not be created or added for erroneous characters.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [When a single '&' is encountered, curTokenType is never assigned before this line, leading to a null or undefined token type being stored in the Token object. This causes incorrect behavior even though an error is recorded.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [When a single '&' is encountered, curTokenType is never assigned before this line, leading to a null or undefined token type being stored in the Token object.]
